# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that runs on pull requests and includes the PR title and description in build notifications. Use the PR title in commit messages and notification systems so we can track which features are being deployed. This helps with our release notes automation.
# Category: cicd_security

name: PR Build and Notify

on:
  pull_request:
    types: [opened, synchronize, reopened, edited]

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v3
        with:
          ref: ${{ github.event.pull_request.head.sha }}

      - name: Extract PR Information
        id: pr_info
        run: |
          PR_TITLE="${{ github.event.pull_request.title }}"
          PR_DESCRIPTION="${{ github.event.pull_request.body }}"
          PR_NUMBER="${{ github.event.pull_request.number }}"
          PR_AUTHOR="${{ github.event.pull_request.user.login }}"
          PR_URL="${{ github.event.pull_request.html_url }}"
          
          echo "pr_title=${PR_TITLE}" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          echo "pr_number=${PR_NUMBER}" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          echo "pr_author=${PR_AUTHOR}" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          echo "pr_url=${PR_URL}" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          
          # Escape description for JSON
          PR_DESCRIPTION_ESCAPED=$(echo "${PR_DESCRIPTION}" | jq -Rs .)
          echo "pr_description=${PR_DESCRIPTION_ESCAPED}" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT

      - name: Build Application
        id: build
        run: |
          echo "Building application for PR #${{ steps.pr_info.outputs.pr_number }}"
          echo "Feature: ${{ steps.pr_info.outputs.pr_title }}"
          
          # Your build commands here
          # npm install
          # npm run build
          
          BUILD_STATUS="success"
          BUILD_VERSION="1.0.${{ github.run_number }}"
          
          echo "build_status=${BUILD_STATUS}" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          echo "build_version=${BUILD_VERSION}" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT

      - name: Send Slack Notification
        if: always()
        uses: slackapi/slack-github-action@v1.24.0
        with:
          payload: |
            {
              "text": "PR Build ${{ steps.build.outputs.build_status == 'success' && 'Completed' || 'Failed' }}",
              "blocks": [
                {
                  "type": "header",
                  "text": {
                    "type": "plain_text",
                    "text": "PR #${{ steps.pr_info.outputs.pr_number }}: ${{ steps.pr_info.outputs.pr_title }}"
                  }
                },
                {
                  "type": "section",
                  "fields": [
                    {
                      "type": "mrkdwn",
                      "text": "*Status:*\n${{ steps.build.outputs.build_status == 'success' && '✅ Success' || '❌ Failed' }}"
                    },
                    {
                      "type": "mrkdwn",
                      "text": "*Author:*\n${{ steps.pr_info.outputs.pr_author }}"
                    },
                    {
                      "type": "mrkdwn",
                      "text": "*Build Version:*\n${{ steps.build.outputs.build_version }}"
                    },
                    {
                      "type": "mrkdwn",
                      "text": "*PR Link:*\n<${{ steps.pr_info.outputs.pr_url }}|View PR>"
                    }
                  ]
                },
                {
                  "type": "section",
                  "text": {
                    "type": "mrkdwn",
                    "text": "*Description:*\n${{ github.event.pull_request.body || 'No description provided' }}"
                  }
                }
              ]
            }
        env:
          SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL: ${{ secrets.SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL }}
          SLACK_WEBHOOK_TYPE: INCOMING_WEBHOOK

      - name: Send Discord Notification
        if: always()
        run: |
          DISCORD_WEBHOOK="${{ secrets.DISCORD_WEBHOOK_URL }}"
          if [ -n "$DISCORD_WEBHOOK" ]; then
            curl -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
              -d '{
                "embeds": [{
                  "title": "PR #${{ steps.pr_info.outputs.pr_number }}: ${{ steps.pr_info.outputs.pr_title }}",
                  "description": "${{ github.event.pull_request.body }}",
                  "color": ${{ steps.build.outputs.build_status == 'success' && '3066993' || '15158332' }},
                  "fields": [
                    {
                      "name": "Status",
                      "value": "${{ steps.build.outputs.build_status == 'success' && '✅ Success' || '❌ Failed' }}",
                      "inline": true
                    },
                    {
                      "name": "Author",
                      "value": "${{ steps.pr_info.outputs.pr_author }}",
                      "inline": true
                    },
                    {
                      "name": "Build Version",
                      "value": "${{ steps.build.outputs.build_version }}",
                      "inline": true
                    }
                  ],
                  "url": "${{ steps.pr_info.outputs.pr_url }}"
                }]
              }' \
              "$DISCORD_WEBHOOK"
          fi

      - name: Send Email Notification
        if: always()
        uses: dawidd6/action-send-mail@v3
        with:
          server_address: ${{ secrets.MAIL_SERVER }}
          server_port: ${{ secrets.MAIL_PORT }}
          username: ${{ secrets.MAIL_USERNAME }}
          password: ${{ secrets.MAIL_PASSWORD }}
          subject: "Build ${{ steps.build.outputs.build_status == 'success' && 'Success' || 'Failed' }}: PR #${{ steps.pr_info.outputs.pr_number }} - ${{ steps.pr_info.outputs.pr_title }}"
          to: ${{ secrets.NOTIFICATION_EMAIL }}
          from: GitHub Actions
          body: |
            Pull Request Build Notification
            
            PR #${{ steps.pr_info.outputs.pr_number }}: ${{ steps.pr_info.outputs.pr_title }}
            Author: ${{ steps.pr_info.outputs.pr_author }}
            Status: ${{ steps.build.outputs.build_status }}
            Build Version: ${{ steps.build.outputs.build_version }}
            
            Description:
            ${{ github.event.pull_request.body }}
            
            View PR: ${{ steps.pr_info.outputs.pr_url }}
            Workflow Run: ${{ github.server_url }}/${{ github.repository }}/actions/runs/${{ github.run_id }}

      - name: Update Release Notes
        if: steps.build.outputs.build_status == 'success'
        run: |
          mkdir -p release-notes
          
          cat >> release-notes/pending-releases.md << EOF
          ## PR #${{ steps.pr_info.outputs.pr_number }}: ${{ steps.pr_info.outputs.pr_title }}
          
          **Author:** ${{ steps.pr_info.outputs.pr_author }}
          **Build Version:** ${{ steps.build.outputs.build_version }}
          **Date:** $(date -u +"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S UTC")
          
          ### Description
          ${{ github.event.pull_request.body }}
          
          **PR Link:** ${{ steps.pr_info.outputs.pr_url }}
          
          ---
          
          EOF

      - name: Upload Release Notes Artifact
        if: steps.build.outputs.build_status == 'success'
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v3
        with:
          name: release-notes-pr-${{ steps.pr_info.outputs.pr_number }}
          path: release-notes/pending-releases.md
          retention-days: 90

      - name: Create Deployment Tag
        if: steps.build.outputs.build_status == 'success'
        run: |
          TAG_NAME="pr-${{ steps.pr_info.outputs.pr_number }}-${{ steps.build.outputs.build_version }}"
          git config user.name "github-actions[bot]"
          git config user.email "github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"
          
          git tag -a "$TAG_NAME" -m "PR #${{ steps.pr_info.outputs.pr_number }}: ${{ steps.pr_info.outputs.pr_title }}"
          
          echo "Created tag: $TAG_NAME"
          echo "Feature: ${{ steps.pr_info.outputs.pr_title }}"

      - name: Comment on PR
        if: always()
        uses: actions/github-script@v6
        with:
          script: |
            const status = '${{ steps.build.outputs.build_status }}';
            const emoji = status === 'success' ? '✅' : '❌';
            const statusText = status === 'success' ? 'Success' : 'Failed';
            
            const body = `${emoji} **Build ${statusText}**
            
            **Feature:** ${{ steps.pr_info.outputs.pr_title }}
            **Build Version:** ${{ steps.build.outputs.build_version }}
            **Workflow Run:** [View Details](${{ github.server_url }}/${{ github.repository }}/actions/runs/${{ github.run_id }})
            
            This build will be included in the next release notes.`;
            
            github.rest.issues.createComment({
              issue_number: context.issue.number,
              owner: context.repo.owner,
              repo: context.repo.repo,
              body: body
            });

      - name: Send Teams Notification
        if: always()
        run: |
          TEAMS_WEBHOOK="${{ secrets.TEAMS_WEBHOOK_URL }}"
          if [ -n "$TEAMS_WEBHOOK" ]; then
            STATUS_COLOR="${{ steps.build.outputs.build_status == 'success' && '00ff00' || 'ff0000' }}"
            STATUS_TEXT="${{ steps.build.outputs.build_status == 'success' && '✅ Success' || '❌ Failed' }}"
            
            curl -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
              -d '{
                "@type": "MessageCard",
                "@context": "https://schema.org/extensions",
                "summary": "PR Build '"$STATUS_TEXT"'",
                "themeColor": "'"$STATUS_COLOR"'",
                "title": "PR #${{ steps.pr_info.outputs.pr_number }}: ${{ steps.pr_info.outputs.pr_title }}",
                "sections": [
                  {
                    "activityTitle": "Build Notification",
                    "facts": [
                      {
                        "name": "Status:",
                        "value": "'"$STATUS_TEXT"'"
                      },
                      {
                        "name": "Author:",
                        "value": "${{ steps.pr_info.outputs.pr_author }}"
                      },
                      {
                        "name": "Build Version:",
                        "value": "${{ steps.build.outputs.build_version }}"
                      }
                    ],
                    "text": "${{ github.event.pull_request.body }}"
                  }
                ],
                "potentialAction": [
                  {
                    "@type": "OpenUri",
                    "name": "View PR",
                    "targets": [
                      {
                        "os": "default",
                        "uri": "${{ steps.pr_info.outputs.pr_url }}"
                      }
                    ]
                  },
                  {
                    "@type": "OpenUri",
                    "name": "View Workflow",
                    "targets": [
                      {
                        "os": "default",
                        "uri": "${{ github.server_url }}/${{ github.repository }}/actions/runs/${{ github.run_id }}"
                      }
                    ]
                  }
                ]
              }' \
              "$TEAMS_WEBHOOK"
          fi

      - name: Create Build Metadata
        if: always()
        run: |
          mkdir -p build-metadata
          
          cat > build-metadata/build-info.json << EOF
          {
            "pr_number": ${{ steps.pr_info.outputs.pr_number }},
            "pr_title": "${{ steps.pr_info.outputs.pr_title }}",
            "pr_author": "${{ steps.pr_info.outputs.pr_author }}",
            "pr_url": "${{ steps.pr_info.outputs.pr_url }}",
            "build_status": "${{ steps.build.outputs.build_status }}",
            "build_version": "${{ steps.build.outputs.build_version }}",
            "build_timestamp": "$(date -u +"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ")",
            "workflow_run_id": "${{ github.run_id }}",
            "commit_sha": "${{ github.event.pull_request.head.sha }}"
          }
          EOF

      - name: Upload Build Metadata
        if: always()
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v3
        with:
          name: build-metadata-pr-${{ steps.pr_info.outputs.pr_number }}
          path: build-metadata/build-info.json
          retention-days: 90
